runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - dashboard, AI assistant, and monitoring parity check

expertAssessments.rationale: 대시보드 수치와 AI assistant 요약의 정합성을 검증하는 run이므로 AI 품질 평가가 직접 관련됩니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: AI summary 생성 경로가 dashboard/OTel-derived system summary와 같은 기준선을 사용하도록 parity regression 원인을 추적합니다.

expertAssessments.rationale: Cloud Run monitoring health와 trace retrieval은 정상이나, 사용자-facing 요약이 운영 지표와 다르면 관측 결과 신뢰성이 떨어집니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: AI summary 응답과 MetricsProvider/system summary의 수치 차이를 재현 가능한 회귀 테스트로 고정합니다.

usageChecks.summary: Production QA 이후 billed 0.0000 USD, effective 1.9599 USD, unexpected billed spike 없음

pendingImprovements.title: AI assistant summary must match dashboard and OTel-derived system counts
pendingImprovements.note: Browser chat returned offline 1 / online 13 while dashboard, server-data, and MetricsProvider all indicate offline 0 / online 14.

wontFixImprovements.title: Frontend AI provider and architecture copy must reflect current routing policy
wontFixImprovements.note: Feature cards and tech stack copy still describe ToolLoopAgent-native flow and stale Cerebras/Groq role assignments.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Landing page, login page, dashboard, AI assistant workspace, and active alerts modal rendered successfully on Vercel production.
Guest-session browser request to /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 returned 200 and streamed a final answer.
Direct unauthenticated curl to /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 returned 401, which is expected without browser guest session state.
Dashboard counters and local code-path verification both reported total 15, online 14, warning 1, critical 0, offline 0.
AI assistant response claimed offline 1 and named api-was-dc1-01 as offline, creating a parity regression against dashboard and MetricsProvider outputs.
Cloud Run /monitoring returned status ok with circuits CLOSED and Langfuse operational.
Cloud Run /monitoring/traces?limit=5 timed out once; retry with limit=1 succeeded and returned a recent supervisor-execution trace.
Browser console had no errors; only low-severity preloaded font warnings were observed.
mode audit fields were not explicitly validated in this run.
dashboard/AI parity run: local getOTelDashboardData and MetricsProvider summary were checked against UI counts in the same run.
